description: Style Note Lightweight with a square neck, this knit vest from facit is crafted with a soft fabric that allows the fabric to contour to your silhouette and help you stretch in ease. The boldly printed shoulder straps helps you show off arm definition, while the graphic and flock print on the chest with the brand tab on the nape of the neck adds rugged styling. The printed brand label on the inner neck provides abrasion-free comfort. Team this with tracks or shorts Product Details Orange sleeveless knit vest with a stylish square neck that accentuates the upper body Bold print armhole strap Ultra slim Fit Graphic and flock print on the chest Abrasion-free label Material and Care Cotton engineered stretch rib knit fabric Machine wash warm at 40 degrees using a mild detergent Tumble dry low Do not bleach Model Statistics The model (height:6' and shoulders:18") is wearing a size M
